data.title: An address withdrew 219,000 LINK tokens from Binance, worth approximately $2.08 million.
data.description: According to Onchain Lens monitoring, an address withdrew 219,000 LINK tokens from Binance, worth approximately $2.08 million, and currently holds 785,000 LINK tokens, worth approximately $7.43 million.

data.title: Significant LINK Withdrawal from CEX Address Observed
data.description: On April 26, a notable transaction was detected involving the address '0x527'. According to BlockBeats On-chain Detection, this address withdrew 219,342 LINK tokens from a centralized exchange (CEX), valued at $2.08 million. Currently, the address holds a total of 784,954 LINK tokens, with an estimated value of $7.43 million.

data.title: Iran and Oman Discuss Security in Strait of Hormuz
data.description: Iran's foreign minister met with the Sultan of Oman to discuss security and safe passage in the Strait of Hormuz. According to NS3.AI, the Iranian Foreign Ministry stated that the discussions also included broader regional security issues.

data.title: Germany Explores Options for Commerzbank Amid UniCredit Concerns
data.description: Germany has been actively seeking potential partners for Commerzbank in an effort to counter interest from UniCredit. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the country's strategic moves earlier this year to secure Commerzbank's future. The initiative underscores Germany's determination to maintain control over its banking sector and prevent foreign acquisition. Commerzbank, one of Germany's major financial institutions, has been at the center of these discussions as the government aims to safeguard its interests. The search for suitable partners reflects the broader challenges faced by European banks in a competitive global market.

data.title: El Salvador Increases Bitcoin Holdings by 31 BTC Over Past Month
data.description: El Salvador has increased its Bitcoin holdings by 31 BTC over the past 30 days, according to ChainCatcher. The country's total Bitcoin reserves now stand at 7,633.37 BTC. The value of these holdings is approximately $624 million.

data.title: Iranian Foreign Minister Calls for Regional Security Mechanism
data.description: Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi has emphasized the need for regional countries to establish a collective security mechanism free from U.S. intervention. According to Odaily, Araghchi highlighted the importance of cooperation among neighboring nations to ensure stability and security in the region.

data.title: Vietnam to Launch Regulated Crypto Asset Pilot Program in 2026
data.description: Vietnam plans to initiate a five-year pilot program for regulated crypto asset trading in the second quarter of 2026. According to ChainCatcher, this initiative aims to transition from offshore, unregulated crypto trading to a domestic, regulated market. Currently, Vietnamese traders handle an annual crypto trading volume of $220 billion to $230 billion, with daily transactions exceeding $600 million. The pilot program will only permit participation from locally registered institutions that meet stringent capital and compliance requirements. Additionally, the traded assets must be backed by real-world assets and settled in Vietnamese dong.

data.title: Planet Evening News
data.description: 1. The top-ranked address holding HYPE tokens has a floating profit of $3.42 million; 2. An address holding 8.38 billion ASTEROID tokens has a floating profit of $434,000; 3. Iranian Foreign Minister Araqchi: Regional countries need to establish a collective security mechanism free from "US interference"; 4. Arkham: The Ethereum Foundation unstaking $48.9 million worth of ETH, and the market is watching whether it will sell further; 5. The suspect in the White House correspondents' dinner shooting admitted that the target was Trump administration officials; 6. A whale bought 2.62 billion ASTEROID tokens in 24 hours, spending 358 ETH; 7. Tron Inc. increased its holdings by 154,494 TRX tokens.

data.title: Peter Schiff Warns of Potential Instability in Strategy's Bitcoin-Backed Model
data.description: Peter Schiff has expressed concerns about Strategy's Bitcoin-backed STRC model, suggesting it could face instability. According to NS3.AI, the preferred stock's variable dividend has increased to 11.5%, which Schiff believes could lead to reduced demand for STRC. Strategy currently holds 815,061 BTC following a $2.54 billion purchase on April 20. Schiff argues that a decline in STRC demand might exert pressure on both MSTR shares and Bitcoin.

data.title: Iranian Foreign Minister Araqchi: Regional countries need to establish a collective security mechanism free from "US interference".
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily reports: Iranian Foreign Ministry: Iranian Foreign Minister Araqchi emphasized that regional countries need to establish a collective security mechanism free from "US interference." (Jinshi)

data.title: Iran claims to have successfully destroyed three US Massive Ordnance Penetrators.
data.description: On April 26 local time, Iran's Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps announced that its special forces had successfully destroyed three US GBU-57 Massive Ordnance Penetrator (MAP) bombs and dismantled another one left in Iran's Zanjan province. The GBU-57 is a heavy bunker buster bomb developed by the United States. The US used this type of bomb in its military operation to strike Iranian nuclear facilities last year, and it has also been used extensively in the US-Iran conflict this year. (CCTV)

data.title: Iranian Forces Destroy U.S. Bunker Bombs
data.description: Iran's Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps announced on April 26 that its special forces successfully destroyed three U.S. GBU-57 bunker bombs. According to Odaily, another bomb left in Iran's Zanjan Province was dismantled. The GBU-57, also known as a bunker buster, is a heavy bomb developed by the United States. It was used in military operations against Iranian nuclear facilities last year and has been deployed extensively in this year's U.S.-Iran conflict.

data.title: Tokenization Expected to Transform ETF Market, Says JPMorgan Executive
data.description: Ciarán Fitzpatrick, Global Head of ETF Products at JPMorgan Securities Services, expressed confidence in the transformative potential of tokenization for the market. According to Odaily, Fitzpatrick highlighted that tokenization could significantly impact not only ETFs but the entire fund industry. He noted the ongoing experiments with ETF tokenization, citing benefits such as easier subscription and redemption processes, 'near-instantaneous settlement,' and continuous access. Fitzpatrick added that while tokenization is expected to become part of the ETF ecosystem, it may take several years before practical use cases emerge.

data.title: TRUMP Token Experiences Significant Decline Amid White House Security Incident
data.description:
The TRUMP token experienced a notable drop of over 10%, reaching approximately $2.60 on April 25. This decline adds to a substantial decrease of more than 97% over the past year. According to NS3.AI, the token's performance has been under scrutiny as market conditions fluctuate.

In a separate incident, gunfire disrupted the White House Correspondents’ Dinner, leading to the evacuation of U.S. President Donald Trump. The security breach occurred when a man armed with multiple weapons charged a security checkpoint.

Earlier on April 25, President Trump hosted 297 of the largest TRUMP token holders at Mar-a-Lago, highlighting the ongoing engagement with key investors despite the token's challenging market performance.

data.title: JPMorgan executive: Tokenization will transform ETFs and the entire fund industry, but it will be years before good use cases emerge.
data.description: “We believe tokenization will definitely drive market change, not only for ETFs but for the entire fund industry,” said Ciarán Fitzpatrick, Global Head of ETF Products at JPMorgan Securities Services. Fitzpatrick noted that ETF tokenization experiments are still underway, given the numerous benefits it could bring, such as easier creation and redemption, “near-instant settlement,” and uninterrupted access. He added, “I think tokenization will become part of the ETF ecosystem, but it will be several years before we see some truly good use cases.” (The Block)

data.title: PRECIOUS METALS | BRICS+ Central Banks Accumulate Over 6,000 Tons of Gold
data.description: BRICS+ central banks have collectively amassed more than 6,000 tons of gold, with China's official reserves reaching 2,313 tons following 17 consecutive months of purchases. According to NS3.AI, China's recent gold discoveries at Wangu, Dadonggou, and off the Shandong coast are contributing to the domestic supply, bolstering the nation's reserve accumulation efforts.

data.title: The top long position in HYPE on Hyperliquid has a floating profit of $3.42 million.
data.description: According to on-chain analyst Ai Yi, the top-ranked address holding HYPE on Hyperliquid has a floating profit of $3.42 million, after previously experiencing a floating loss of $23.18 million. This address began taking large long positions in HYPE at the end of October last year and currently holds 1.38 million tokens (worth $56.82 million), with an opening price of $38.675. When HYPE fell to around $20 in January this year, this address repeatedly deposited margin to avoid liquidation. Due to the long holding period and large size of the position, its funding rate per HYPE token reached $2.107 million.

data.title: Strategies of Corporations, Sovereign Funds, and ETFs During Bear Markets
data.description: According to PANews, corporations, sovereign funds, and exchange-traded funds (ETFs) have adopted various strategies to navigate bear markets. These entities are focusing on diversification and risk management to safeguard their investments. Corporations are adjusting their portfolios to include more stable assets, while sovereign funds are leveraging their long-term investment horizons to capitalize on market downturns. ETFs are being utilized for their flexibility and liquidity, allowing investors to respond swiftly to market changes. The emphasis remains on maintaining a balanced approach to mitigate potential losses during periods of economic uncertainty.

data.title: PRECIOUS METALS | Guotai Junan UBS Fund Suspends Trading Due to Silver Futures Fund Premium
data.description: On April 26, Guotai Junan UBS Fund announced that the market trading price of its Guotai Junan UBS Silver Futures Securities Investment Fund (LOF) A-class shares significantly exceeded the net asset value, resulting in a substantial premium. According to Jin10, the fund will suspend trading from the market opening until 10:30 on April 27, 2026, and will resume trading at 10:30. Redemption services will continue as usual during the suspension period. If the premium does not effectively decrease on the same day, the fund reserves the right to implement further suspension measures.
